name: ocr-improvements
description: Test OCR functionality with PDF documents, verifying text extraction and layout analysis

steps.name: Layout analysis test
steps.check: Document layout analyzer successfully analyzes PDF structure

steps.name: Table extraction test
steps.check: Table extraction identifies tables in document

steps.name: Image extraction test
steps.check: Images are properly extracted from PDF

layoutAnalysis.structureType: one of: structured-document, image-heavy-document, text-dense-document, mixed-document, sparse-text, image-heavy, balanced, fragmented

testScenarios.name: test-layout-analysis
testScenarios.description: Test document layout analysis on PDF
testScenarios.setup: Ensure PDF file exists in testfiles directory or provide path

testScenarios.name: test-text-extraction
testScenarios.setup: Ensure PDF file exists in testfiles directory or provide path

testScenarios.name: test-ocr-post-processing
testScenarios.description: Test OCR post-processing improves text quality
testScenarios.setup: Ensure PDF file exists in testfiles directory or provide path

testScenarios.name: test-table-extraction
testScenarios.setup: Ensure PDF file exists in testfiles directory or provide path

testScenarios.name: test-image-extraction
testScenarios.setup: Ensure PDF file exists in testfiles directory or provide path

testScenarios.name: test-full-integration
testScenarios.description: Test complete PDF parsing with all OCR improvements
testScenarios.setup: Ensure PDF file exists in testfiles directory or provide path

setupInstructions: 2. Place a sample PDF file in test/testfiles/
3. Run the test script: node test/test-ocr-improvements.js [pdf-file-path]
cleanupInstructions: 1. Remove any test PDF files if created
